rollup_summaries.description: Instruction name is already proven in gfx950 with both raw decode coverage and interpreter semantics.

Instruction name exists in gfx950 lineage, but Mirage still needs decoder work before the local target can rely on it. This rollup is decoder-first and includes opcodes that still need both decoder and semantic work.
Binary decode precedent exists in gfx950 coverage, but execution semantics still need to be carried over.
Instruction name is absent from the gfx950 catalog and needs gfx1201-local handling.

state_summaries.description: Both raw decode coverage and semantics already exist in gfx950.
Semantics exist in gfx950 coverage, but raw decode support is still missing.
Raw decode support exists in gfx950 coverage, but semantics are still missing.
Instruction name exists in gfx950, but neither decode nor semantics are ready.
Instruction name is new relative to gfx950.
